extraction_notes: Extracted from Walmart fiscal 2026 10-K. Identified three reportable segments (Walmart U.S., Walmart International, Sam's Club U.S.) with omnichannel operations across retail and online channels. Mapped offerings including membership programs, digital platforms (walmart.com, samsclub.com, Flipkart, PhonePe), advertising solutions, financial services, and private brands. Revenue models identified as subscription (memberships), advertising (ad solutions), and service fees (financial services). Geographic scope consolidated to macro regions: North America, Latin America, Asia, and Africa.
